title: Verify Trial Corner hub UI components for an active trial
description: Test that all required UI sections are present on the Trial Corner screen for a user with an active trial.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the Trial Corner cohort
User is on the Trial Corner screen

steps.description: 2. Verify the presence of the Hero section with trial status
3. Verify the presence of the 'Progress & Benefits' section
4. Verify the presence of the 'Engagement' section
5. Verify the presence of the 'Trending' section
6. Verify the presence of the 'Manage Trial' section with all controls

expected_result: All 5 sections (Hero, Progress & Benefits, Engagement, Trending, Manage Trial) are displayed correctly.
